data.acceptance:
✓ Event schema defined (list knot lifecycle events, message structure, fields)
✓ Transport pattern selected with documented rationale (explain why chosen pattern best fits constraints)
✓ Delivery guarantees specified (ordering, at-least-once vs exactly-once, idempotency)
✓ Local-first strategy clarified (how in-process and network clients differ; whether separate code paths or unified API)
✓ Design document written (RFC or architecture note linked in knot description)
